subject: Silver Shadow Cave
fact: The Silver Shadow Cave is the starting point of the party's current expedition located in Elventree.
source_quote: The starting point of the party's current expedition, located in Elventree.

subject: The Waydown
fact: The Waydown is a sinkhole located a half-day's journey from Hillsfar that serves as a familiar entrance to the Underdark.
source_quote: A sinkhole located a half-day's journey from Hillsfar, serving as a familiar entrance to the Underdark.

subject: The Waydown
fact: The Waydown is now partially surrounded by a wall and guarded by soldiers.
source_quote: It is now partially surrounded by a wall and guarded by soldiers.

subject: The Waydown
fact: The sinkhole descends one hundred feet to a swift-flowing underground river.
source_quote: The sinkhole descends one hundred feet to a swift-flowing underground river.

subject: Underdark
fact: The party travels through rough and less worn tunnels and caves for two days to reach the Howling Pits.
source_quote: The party travels through rough and less worn tunnels and caves for two days to reach the Howling Pits.

subject: Howling Pits
fact: The Howling Pits are known for tunnels varying between ten to thirty feet wide and just as tall.
source_quote: known for its tunnels varying between ten to thirty feet wide and just as tall.

subject: Howling Pits
fact: A maddening, howling wind is ever-present in the Howling Pits, masking sounds more than seventy-five feet away.
source_quote: A maddening, howling wind is ever-present, masking sounds more than seventy-five feet away.

subject: Fire Giant Cave
fact: Two mutated fire giants ambushed the party in a large, dark cave within the Howling Pits.
source_quote: A large, dark cave within the Howling Pits where two mutated fire giants ambushed the party.

subject: Deep Pits Section
fact: The party had to fly across the Deep Pits Section to avoid falling into dangerously deep pits.
source_quote: The party had to fly across this area to avoid falling.

subject: Underground River Cave
fact: The Underground River Cave is bisected by a fifteen-foot wide, swift-flowing underground river.
source_quote: bisected by a fifteen-foot wide, swift-flowing underground river.

subject: Underground River Cave
fact: The banks of the Underground River Cave are covered in strange gray and white fungi known as Cave Creepers that can drive people mad if touched.
source_quote: Its banks are covered in strange gray and white fungi known as Cave Creepers that can drive people mad if touched.

subject: Yellow Mold Tunnel
fact: The Yellow Mold Tunnel is peppered with patches of poisonous yellow mold.
source_quote: A tunnel within the Howling Pits peppered with patches of poisonous yellow mold.

subject: Cloaker Tunnel
fact: The Cloaker Tunnel constricts to only five feet wide in places.
source_quote: A narrow passageway within the Howling Pits that constricts to only five feet wide in places

subject: Cloaker Tunnel
fact: The ceiling of the Cloaker Tunnel rises to thirty feet.
source_quote: with a ceiling rising to thirty feet.

subject: Murssvayas
fact: Murssvayas provided the party with accurate directions and a map for their journey through the Underdark to the Howling Pits.
source_quote: An individual who provided the party with accurate directions and a map for their journey through the Underdark to the Howling Pits.

subject: Red Plume Soldiers
fact: Two nervous guards in splint armor, shields, longswords, and short bows are stationed at The Waydown.
source_quote: Two nervous guards in splint armor, shields, longswords, and short bows stationed at The Waydown.

subject: Red Plume Soldiers
fact: The Red Plume guards recognize the party as the heroes who saved Hillsfar from demonic possession.
source_quote: They recognize the party as the heroes who saved Hillsfar from demonic possession

subject: Vuhm Yestral
fact: Vuhm Yestral is the commander of the Red Plumes who previously helped a group of adventurers in the Underdark.
source_quote: The commander of the Red Plumes who previously helped a group of adventurers in the Underdark.

subject: Vuhm Yestral
fact: Vuhm Yestral has returned to Hillsfar with a larger contingent of the Red Plumes, leaving only two soldiers to guard The Waydown.
source_quote: He has since returned to Hillsfar with a larger contingent of the Red Plumes, leaving only two soldiers to guard The Waydown.

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear is the party's animal companion and martial sidekick.
source_quote: The party's animal companion and martial sidekick.

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear is enhanced with magical gloves that grant a plus one bonus to attack and damage.
source_quote: Enhanced with magical gloves that grant a plus one bonus to attack and damage

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear has improved critical hits on rolls of nineteen or twenty.
source_quote: the Owlbear has improved critical hits on rolls of nineteen or twenty

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear has extra attack capabilities.
source_quote: extra attack capabilities

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear has an increased proficiency bonus.
source_quote: and an increased proficiency bonus.

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear participated in combat by attacking fire giants with its magical claws.
source_quote: It participates in combat, attacking fire giants with its magical claws

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear successfully navigated environmental hazards throughout the journey.
source_quote: and successfully navigating environmental hazards throughout the journey.

subject: Mutated Fire Giants
fact: Two fire giants encountered in a large cave within the Howling Pits showed clear signs of madness.
source_quote: showing clear signs of madness.

subject: Mutated Fire Giants
fact: One of the mutated fire giants possesses leathery wings too small for flight.
source_quote: One possesses leathery wings too small for flight

subject: Mutated Fire Giants
fact: One of the mutated fire giants has an extra eye.
source_quote: while the other has an extra eye.

subject: Mutated Fire Giants
fact: The mutated fire giants are aggressive and powerful, capable of devastating attacks with their greatswords.
source_quote: They are aggressive and powerful, capable of devastating attacks with their greatswords.

subject: Mutated Fire Giants
fact: After the party fled, the giants laughed and returned to lying down in their cave.
source_quote: After the party fled, the giants laughed and returned to lying down in their cave.

subject: Cloakers
fact: Cloakers are mysterious and intelligent bat-like predators of the Underdark that lurk in narrow tunnels with high ceilings.
source_quote: Mysterious and intelligent bat-like predators of the Underdark that lurk in narrow tunnels with high ceilings.

subject: Cloakers
fact: Cloakers descend from above to attack their prey, using darkvision to hunt.
source_quote: They descend from above to attack their prey, using darkvision to hunt.

subject: Cloakers
fact: The party successfully avoided the cloakers through stealth.
source_quote: The party successfully avoided them through stealth.

subject: Magical Gloves (Owlbear)
fact: The Magical Gloves for the Owlbear are a pair of uncommon magical gloves crafted at a cost of one hundred gold pieces.
source_quote: A pair of uncommon magical gloves crafted for the Owlbear at a cost of one hundred gold pieces.

subject: Magical Gloves (Owlbear)
fact: The gloves make the Owlbear's claw attacks magical and provide a plus one bonus to both attack rolls and damage.
source_quote: The gloves make the Owlbear's claw attacks magical and provide a plus one bonus to both attack rolls and damage.

subject: Goggles of Night
fact: Daein purchased the Goggles of Night for two hundred gold pieces before descending into the Underdark.
source_quote: A magical item purchased by Daein for two hundred gold pieces before descending into the Underdark.

subject: Goggles of Night
fact: The Goggles of Night grant the wearer darkvision, allowing Daein to see clearly in the perpetual darkness of the Underdark.
source_quote: The goggles grant the wearer darkvision, allowing Daein to see clearly in the perpetual darkness of the Underdark

subject: Daein's Mandolin
fact: Daein's Mandolin is a magical musical instrument used to cast spells.
source_quote: A magical musical instrument used by Daein to cast spells.

subject: Daein's Mandolin
fact: The mandolin can grant the Fly spell to a creature but cannot cast the same spell again until the next dawn.
source_quote: It can grant the Fly spell to a creature, though it cannot cast the same spell again until the next dawn.

subject: Daein's Mandolin
fact: Daein used the mandolin to grant himself flight.
source_quote: Daein used it to grant himself flight

subject: Yellow Mold Encounter
fact: The party entered a tunnel peppered with patches of yellow mold throughout the lowest tunnels of the Howling Pits.
source_quote: The party enters a tunnel peppered with patches of yellow mold throughout the lowest tunnels of the Howling Pits.

subject: Yellow Mold Encounter
fact: A sudden wind picked up, threatening to spread the poisonous spores of the mold.
source_quote: A sudden wind picks up, threatening to spread the poisonous spores of the mold.

subject: Yellow Mold Encounter
fact: Akritas successfully identified the spores as poisonous with a nature check, recognizing they would form a cloud with the winds.
source_quote: Akritas successfully identifies the spores as poisonous with a nature check, recognizing they will form a cloud with the winds.

subject: Yellow Mold Encounter
fact: The party decided to hold their breath and make Constitution saving throws to pass through the affected area.
source_quote: The party decides to hold their breath and make Constitution saving throws to pass through the affected area.

subject: Yellow Mold Encounter
fact: Daein, Akritas, and the Owlbear successfully resisted the poison.
source_quote: Daein, Akritas, and the Owlbear successfully resist the poison.

subject: Yellow Mold Encounter
fact: Bramgrim failed his initial save and took eleven points of damage despite being resistant to poison.
source_quote: Bramgrim, despite being resistant to poison, fails his initial save and takes eleven points of damage.

subject: Yellow Mold Encounter
fact: Bramgrim made a second saving throw and succeeded, preventing further effects.
source_quote: Bramgrim makes a second saving throw and succeeds, preventing further effects.

subject: Yellow Mold Encounter
fact: After the wind carried the poison away, the party became immune to the poisonous fumes in that area.
source_quote: After the wind carries the poison away, the party becomes immune to the poisonous fumes in that area.

subject: Cloaker Tunnel Entry
fact: The party entered a narrow passageway that constricts to only five feet wide in places, with a ceiling rising to thirty feet.
source_quote: The party enters a narrow passageway that constricts to only five feet wide in places, with a ceiling rising to thirty feet.

subject: Cloaker Tunnel Entry
fact: Bramgrim refused to lead the party through the narrow passage, pointing to Daein and suggesting he go first.
source_quote: Bramgrim refuses to lead the party through the narrow passage, pointing to Daein and suggesting he go first.

subject: Cloaker Tunnel Entry
fact: Bramgrim expressed concern that the tight passageway with high ceilings would be an ideal place for an ambush from above.
source_quote: Bramgrim expresses concern that the tight passageway with high ceilings would be an ideal place for an ambush from above.

subject: Cloaker Tunnel Entry
fact: Bramgrim suggested that Akritas cast Pass Without Trace again to help them sneak through safely.
source_quote: Bramgrim suggests that Akritas cast Pass Without Trace again to help them sneak through safely.

subject: Cloaker Discovery
fact: Daein used his investigation skills and rolled a twenty-four, spotting bat-like creatures lurking in the tunnel.
source_quote: Daein uses his investigation skills and rolls a twenty-four, spotting bat-like creatures lurking in the tunnel.

subject: Cloaker Identification
fact: Akritas identified the creatures as cloakers, mysterious and intelligent Underdark predators that descend from above to attack.
source_quote: Akritas identifies the creatures as cloakers, mysterious and intelligent Underdark predators that descend from above to attack.

subject: Cloaker Evasion
fact: Akritas cast Pass Without Trace, and the entire party rolled high on their stealth checks.
source_quote: Akritas casts Pass Without Trace, and the entire party rolls high on their stealth checks.

subject: Cloaker Evasion
fact: The party successfully sneaked past the cloakers, avoiding a dangerous encounter and reaching the edge of the cave safely.
source_quote: The party successfully sneaks past the cloakers, avoiding a dangerous encounter and reaching the edge of the cave safely.

subject: Fire Giant Ambush
fact: Felkur cast the spell Catapult against one of the mutated fire giants during the ambush.
source_quote: A spell cast by Felkur against one of the mutated fire giants during the ambush.

subject: Fire Giant Ambush
fact: Felkur rolled extremely poorly with Catapult and dealt only four points of damage to the giant.
source_quote: with Felkur rolling extremely poorly and dealing only four points of damage to the giant.

subject: Fire Giant Ambush
fact: Daein used the Protective Field ability to protect Bramgrim from the fire giant's devastating attacks.
source_quote: A defensive reaction ability used by Daein to protect Bramgrim from the fire giant's devastating attacks.

subject: Fire Giant Ambush
fact: The Protective Field reduced incoming damage by four points, which proved insufficient against the giant's critical hit that knocked Bramgrim unconscious.
source_quote: When activated, it reduces incoming damage by four points, though this proved insufficient against the giant's critical hit that knocked Bramgrim unconscious.

subject: Fire Giant Ambush
fact: Bramgrim cast the spell Spirit Guardians at fifth level during the fire giant encounter.
source_quote: A powerful spell cast by Bramgrim at fifth level during the fire giant encounter.

subject: Fire Giant Ambush
fact: The Spirit Guardians spell created a radiant aura with a fifteen-foot radius around the caster that harms enemies and halves their movement speed if they fail a Wisdom saving throw.
source_quote: The spell creates a radiant aura with a fifteen-foot radius around the caster that harms enemies and halves their movement speed if they fail a Wisdom saving throw.

subject: Fire Giant Ambush
fact: Bramgrim positioned himself strategically to affect both giants before being knocked unconscious.
source_quote: Bramgrim positioned himself strategically to affect both giants before being knocked unconscious.

subject: Fire Giant Escape
fact: The party successfully sneaked past the fire giants after their initial defeat.
source_quote: allowing them to successfully sneak past the fire giants after their initial defeat

subject: Fly Spell Usage
fact: Daein cast the Fly spell using his magical mandolin, granting flight with a duration of one hour and requiring concentration.
source_quote: A spell cast by Daein using his magical mandolin, granting flight with a duration of one hour and requiring concentration.

subject: Fly Spell Usage
fact: Daein used the Fly spell on himself to scout ahead and navigate dangerous terrain.
source_quote: Daein used it to grant himself flight and then relied on his own powers to transfer the rest of the party across dangerous terrain including deep pits and the underground river.

subject: Fly Spell Usage
fact: The mandolin can only cast the same spell once per day, so Daein relied on his own powers to transfer the rest of the party across obstacles like the deep pits and the underground river filled with Cave Creeper fungi.
source_quote: The mandolin can only cast the same spell once per day, so Daein relied on his own powers to transfer the rest of the party across obstacles like the deep pits and the underground river filled with Cave Creeper fungi.

subject: Cave Creepers
fact: Cave Creepers are strange gray and white fungi that can drive people mad if touched.
source_quote: strange gray and white fungi known as Cave Creepers that can drive people mad if touched.

subject: Pass Without Trace Duration
fact: The duration of the Pass Without Trace spell is one hour and requires concentration.
source_quote: The spell's duration is one hour and requires concentration.

subject: Fly Spell Duration
fact: The duration of the Fly spell is one hour and requires concentration.
source_quote: granting flight with a duration of one hour and requiring concentration.

subject: Mandolin Cooldown
fact: The mandolin cannot cast the same spell again until the next dawn.
source_quote: though it cannot cast the same spell again until the next dawn.
